prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京大学在河北省物理类最低录取位次分别为约64名、60名、55名、56名、82名。2021–2024年位次稳定在55–64名区间，2025年骤降至82名，较2024                        年后移26名，为近五年最大降幅，显示当年报考热度出现明显变化；北京大学在河北省物理类招生计划：2021–2024年均为18人，2025年增至25人，2026年计划29人，较2025年扩招4人（增幅16%）。扩招在一定程度上缓解竞争压力，但扩招幅度与位次后移幅度相比仍有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985、211、双一流建设                        高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年持续位列第2名，稳居全国顶尖层次，对考生吸引力长期稳定；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、食堂宿舍等舆                        情事件；但抖音热度排名第3（高热），综合热度1135.9万，短视频曝光量极高，反映报考关注度仍处高位。2025年投档异常信号为高关注（湖北提前批首次空档、元培课程争议                         等），可能对报考心理产生一定抑制；北京大学拥有A+学科35个（含数学、物理学、化学、生物学、计算机科学与技术、法学、经济学等），A-及以上学科共计                        41个，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热；河北省2026年高考总人数约60.98万                        （较2025年约60.68万小幅增加），物理类考生占比约60%，竞争基数扩大，2025年物理类本科批459分，近年呈上升趋势，卷面难度未出现剧烈波动；北京大学位于北京（非本省），河北省为邻省，地域偏好正面；该校在河北招生占比约2.3%–3.0%（2025年约18人/全国598人），属中等偏低水平，跨省报考竞争格局稳                         定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移（82名）的基准、2026年扩招16%的缓和效应、河北省考生总数小幅增加及声誉偏负面但抖音高热的多重信号，预计2026年物理类                         最低录取位次较2025年小幅回升。扩招是推动位次数字减小（竞争加剧）的主要缓和因素，而考生基数扩大和声誉偏负面则对位次有上移压力。预测最低位次约85名，区间65–105名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University in Hebei Province Physics Category were approximately 64, 60, 55, 56, and 82 respectively. Rankings from 2021 to 2024 were stable in the 55–64 range, but in 2025 there was a sharp drop to 82, a decrease of 26 places compared to 2024, the largest decline in five years, indicating a significant change in application popularity that year. The enrollment plan for Peking University in Hebei Province Physics Category: 18 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 25 in 2025, and planned 29 in 2026, an increase of 4 students (16%) compared to 2025. The expansion alleviates competition pressure to some extent, but the magnitude of expansion is still limited compared to the magnitude of ranking decline.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it consistently ranked 2nd, firmly at the national top level, with long-term stable appeal to candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety, cafeteria, dormitory, and other public opinion incidents. However, Douyin popularity ranked 3rd (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 11.359 million, extremely high short video exposure, reflecting that application attention remains high. The abnormal signal for 2025 admission was high attention (first vacancy in Hubei early batch, Yuanpei curriculum controversy, etc.), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Peking University has 35 A+ disciplines (including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science and Technology, Law, Economics, etc.), and a total of 41 disciplines at A- or above, with top national disciplinary strength, extremely strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province college entrance examination is approximately 609,800 (a slight increase from about 606,800 in 2025), with Physics Category candidates accounting for about 60%, expanding the competition base. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch score was 459, showing an upward trend in recent years, with no drastic fluctuations in exam difficulty. Peking University is located in Beijing (not within the province), and Hebei is a neighboring province, with positive regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Hebei is about 2.3%–3.0% (about 18 out of 598 nationwide in 2025), at a moderately low level, with a stable cross-provincial application competition pattern.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the benchmark of a significant ranking decline in 2025 (82), the mitigating effect of a 16% enrollment expansion in 2026, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hebei Province, and multiple signals of somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin heat, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly recover compared to 2025. The expansion is the main mitigating factor pushing the ranking number smaller (intensifying competition), while the increase in candidate base and somewhat negative reputation exert upward pressure on the ranking. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 85, with a range of 65–105.

Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 65–105 are advised to actively apply; those with rankings better than 65 can boldly fill in, while those with rankings around 105 can treat it as a reach goal.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University in Hebei Province's History Category were approximately 30, 32 (2022 school line data is 0, based on major_score_details 32), 30, 32, and 43. Rankings from 2021 to 2024 were stable in the 30–32 range, but dropped sharply to 43 in 2025, a decrease of 11 places from 2024, the largest drop in five years. Peking University's enrollment plan for the History Category in Hebei Province: 22 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and still 22 students in 2026, remaining unchanged for six consecutive years, with a stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It ranked 2nd in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, consistently at the top national level, with long-term stable appeal to liberal arts candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety, dormitory, and cafeteria issues. It ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of 11.359 million, extremely high short video exposure. The 2025 abnormal admission signal is high attention (e.g., first vacancy in Hubei early batch), which may somewhat suppress application psychology. Peking University has 35 A+ disciplines, including A+ in Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Sociology, Applied Economics, and Business Administration, directly related to liberal arts advantages, strongly attracting History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature, and Teacher Training/Education show social popularity differentiation (Law is hot but competitive, Chinese Language recommended). In 2026, the total number of Hebei Province college entrance exam takers is about 609,800, with History Category candidates accounting for about 40%, expanding the competition base. In 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch score was 477, showing an upward trend in recent years. Peking University is located in Beijing (not in the province), Hebei is a neighboring province, with positive regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Hebei is about 2.3%–3.0%, with a stable cross-province application competition pattern.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant backward shift in 2025 ranking (43rd), unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, slight increase in Hebei candidate total, and multiple signals of negative reputation but high Douyin heat, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the History Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The unchanged enrollment plan means competition pressure is not alleviated, and the expansion of the candidate base and negative reputation are the main factors driving the ranking number upward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 45th, with a range of 25–65.
